title: Seaquest DSV
overview: In the early 21st century, mankind has colonized the oceans. The United Earth Oceans Organization enlists Captain Nathan Bridger and the submarine seaQuest DSV to keep the peace and explore the last frontier on Earth.
creator: Rockne S. O'Bannon

episodes.title: Knight of Shadows
episodes.overview:
When Bridger is hurled across his quarters by an unknown force, it leads the seaQuest to find a hundred-year-old sunken ship.

The spirits of those who perished there haunt its ancient hull, one of which possesses Dr. Westphalen.
